data.title: Majority of institutional investors believe Bitcoin is undervalued as it dropped almost 30% post-October, contrasting with rise in gold and silver.
data.description: Following a significant market crash in October, the value of Bitcoin has dropped by around 30%. Meanwhile, traditional safe investments such as gold and silver have experienced a significant increase in value.

data.title: Accevo recognized by Frost & Sullivan for manufacturing software in Europe, enabling digital transformation and innovative smart factories.
data.description: Accevo has been recognized for its role in facilitating digital transformation, performance-oriented smart manufacturing, and scalable manufacturing software innovation in European factories and around the world. The acknowledgment was made in San Antonio on January 25, 2026. Frost & Sullivan, a leading research firm, commended Accevo for its efforts in this area.

data.title: Vivani Medical, Inc. prices stock offering: 1,689,200 shares at $1.48/share with total proceeds of $4.5 million.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, Vivani Medical, Inc. (Nasdaq: VANI) announced a pricing update regarding its offerings. The company is conducting a registered direct offering of 1,689,200 shares of common stock at $1.48 per share, alongside a private placement of 1,351,351 shares at the same price, bought by Gregg Williams, the Chairman of the board. Both offerings were priced "at-the-market" under Nasdaq regulations. The total gross proceeds from these offerings are expected to reach around $4.5 million before deductions for fees and expenses. The closing of both the registered offering and private placement is anticipated to occur around January 27, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci praises Trump admin for positive impact on cryptocurrency sector, lauding foresight and appointees.
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, the founder of SkyBridge Capital, recently commended the Trump administration for its positive effects on the cryptocurrency industry. In a social media post, Scaramucci shared his praise for President Trump's understanding of the potential of cryptocurrencies, stating that Trump's support has been beneficial for the industry. He also highlighted the appointments of key figures such as White House Crypto Czar David Sacks, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, and SEC Chair Paul Atkins, emphasizing that they have contributed to creating a favorable environment for cryptocurrency. According to Scaramucci, the current administration's approach to crypto is superior to what a Biden or Harris presidency would offer.
